rulings.Rulings: Respondent Glenn Lerner's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is denied. Requests for Judicial Notice numbers 1, 2, 3 and 4: the court takes judicial notice of the allegations contained therein; Request 5: granted. Any party who wishes to argue the matter must notify the court (415-551-3702) and all opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. 10/8/13.
